Description: OAuth-based sign-in using a Google account.
Anonymous, no-credential entry into the app with local/session-based identity.
Collect Age, Gender, Height, Weight, Fitness Goal, Activity Level, Exercise Preferences.
Allow onboarding questions to be answered via voice or typed text.
Compute and display Body Mass Index from height and weight.
Compute MHR using 220 - Age.
Compute and display the 60-80% MHR target training zone.
Rules-based engine assigning one or more personas based on onboarding inputs and behavior.
Expose persona tags to downstream features (workout engine, AI Avatar tone).
Generate 3-4 distinct workout plan options per recommendation cycle.
Highlight exactly one recommended workout among the generated options.
Tailor plan generation using Goal, Fitness Level, Persona, and User Inputs.
Text-to-speech delivery of coaching cues during workouts and conversation.
Context-aware motivational messaging tied to user activity and milestones.
Two-way text/voice chat with the AI Avatar at any time.
User-configurable setting controlling AI proactivity and verbosity.
Show step-by-step exercise instructions during a session.
Countdown/count-up timers for exercises, sets, and rest periods.
Visual indicator of progress through the current session.
Allow the user to pause and resume an active session without losing state.
Record session completion status and write results to history.
Surface the current day's recommended workout on the dashboard.
Show current XP total and progress on the dashboard.
Show current and longest streaks on the dashboard.
Show a condensed recent workout history on the dashboard.
Show a summary view of progress toward the user's fitness goal.
Award and track experience points for user actions.
Translate accumulated XP into user levels with level-up moments.
Track consecutive workout activity with grace-day logic.
Award badges for defined milestones and behaviors.
Persist and list all completed workout sessions.
Allow the user to browse historical activity over time (weekly/monthly).
Show progress made toward the user's stated fitness goal.
Surface trend insights (e.g., consistency, volume) over time.
